text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the academy is holding a meet-and-greet
event for fans.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I just love the way you run, Ayabe! You look like
a shooting star the way you break away from the
pack.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you run fills me with courage! I've wanted
to tell you that for the longest time!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll continue to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
That goes for your trainer, too! It's fantastic how
you coordinate together!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to seeing great things from
you two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the words of praise, Admire Vega seems
to be stiffening up the longer we're here.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. The next person is coming.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She brushes me off and prepares for the coming
visitors.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
I watched your mother race, too! I hope you live
up to her legacy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you. I hope for your continued support.

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you win your next race! I'm rooting for
you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She responds the same as usual, but I can see
she's gradually getting more stressed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that evening, Admire Vega has disappeared
somewhere. Out of concern, I go search for her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be at it training by herself again. I can't
help but wonder why she's pushing so hard. Could
it be...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What is it?
choice_data_list: Do you struggle with events like today?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Not really...
choice_data_list:
If you're uncomfortable, we could always
reduce the number of visitors—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's not necessary.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Rather... I need to listen more to my fans.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Their support... it isn't really meant for me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's her... who should be receiving the praise.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yet here I am... receiving what's hers.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's why... I have to meet their expectations.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's been my mission since I was born. It's the only
thing I can do.
choice_data_list: I'll do whatever I can to help.
I'll do whatever I can to help.
It's not the only thing you can do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's been my mission since I was born. It's the only
thing I can do.
choice_data_list: I'll do whatever I can to help.
I'll do whatever I can to help.
It's not the only thing you can do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to seeing great things from
you two!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Meeting their expectations...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well... I'll try not to overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Like what?
choice_data_list: Your running can inspire courage in others.
Your running can inspire courage in others.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you run fills me with courage! I've wanted
to tell you that for the longest time!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.
